title: calochortus albus
intro: Calochortus albus, also known as the white mariposa lily, is a perennial plant species native to the western regions of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The health benefits of Calochortus albus include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Calochortus albus can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
